_fixture_meta.source: DOCS-DERIVED, LAYER-2 RECONCILED (2026-06-26) against the Paddle webhook simulator. This fixture models a RENEWAL (origin 'subscription_recurring', custom_data present for the resolution-path test). NOTE: the simulator captured a FIRST charge — see reconcile.
_fixture_meta.reconcile: RESOLVED: subscription_id NON-null CONFIRMED, details.totals.grand_total is a STRING ('65215' in capture) CONFIRMED. ORIGIN: a subscription's FIRST charge arrives with origin 'web' (NOT 'subscription_*') while subscription_id IS present; renewals carry 'subscription_recurring'. The handler's origin warning was refined (route.ts) so this legitimate first-charge pairing no longer false-warns. STILL DEFERRED (not provable via simulator): custom_data.user_id propagation — the simulator sends custom_data:null (it doesn't run our real checkout). Whether user_id survives onto the recurring charge is confirmed only at the first PRODUCTION event.
_fixture_meta.locks: subscription_id NON-null (distinguishes from pack), items[0].price.id = SUB price, details.totals.grand_total is a STRING, data.origin is corroboration-only (first-charge='web', renewal='subscription_recurring'); custom_data.user_id propagation NOT YET PROVEN
